description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with a mix of light wood and dark paneling on the exterior. The front facade includes a covered entryway, a small porch, and a single-car garage integrated into the structure. Large windows dominate both the front and rear, allowing for ample natural light and providing views of the landscaped garden and backyard. The backyard is enclosed by hedges and includes a patio area with outdoor furniture, a pool, and a shaded seating area. The upper level appears to have a rooftop terrace with additional seating, enhancing the outdoor living space. The property is surrounded by lush greenery, including trees and manicured hedges, creating a private and inviting atmosphere.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a single-car garage, rooftop terrace, and landscaped garden with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, garage, and symmetrical window arrangement with lush hedges.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the rooftop terrace, backyard pool, patio, and extensive window coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard garden, pool, outdoor seating, and large rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Side view with visible rooftop terrace, backyard amenities, and the dark-paneled side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
